retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional and always succeeds; there is no failure case to retry.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that releases one reference on a BPF program by decrementing its refcount. It delegates entirely to __bpf_prog_put, which may free the program if the refcount reaches zero. After calling this function, the caller must not use the program pointer again, as it may be dangling. No special locking is required beyond what the caller already holds (typically RCU or mutex). This is the standard release operation for BPF program references.
